input: Create a storyboard for a 60-second product explainer video for Glint (B2B SaaS, auto-generates engineering status reports from Jira + Slack). Target viewer: engineering manager. Distribution: LinkedIn feed. Goal: book a demo. No narration — captions only. Hook must establish pain in the first 5 seconds.

Storyboard a 90-second brand video for Ember Candles (DTC soy candles, $38-58, premium home market). Platform: Instagram Reels + TikTok. Mood: warm, tactile, aspirational. No voiceover — music + text overlays only. Show the product being made and used in a styled home. End with website URL.

Create a storyboard for a 45-second testimonial-style video for Vaultly (B2B document automation). Subject: a RevOps manager named Sarah explaining how she cut proposal creation time from 2 hours to 15 minutes. Shot on webcam style (authentic, not polished). Captions required for accessibility. Platform: LinkedIn + email embed.

Storyboard a 60-second 'how it works' video for Fiora (habit + mood tracking app). Audience: skeptical adults who've quit other habit apps. Show the onboarding flow in 3 steps. No streak counters shown (brand rule). Gentle, calm visual style. Platform: App Store preview + website.

Create a storyboard for a 30-second paid social ad for Clipr (async video messaging for remote sales teams). Platform: LinkedIn in-feed video. Hook: show a frustrated sales rep recording the same product walkthrough for the 8th time this week. End CTA: 'Start free — no credit card.' Fast paced, text-heavy, muted-safe (most LinkedIn video watched without sound).

Storyboard a 2-minute tutorial video for Draftly (AI writing assistant for LinkedIn creators). Topic: 'How to turn one interview into a week of LinkedIn content using Draftly.' Platform: YouTube + embedded in onboarding email. Include a chapter structure. Viewer is a new paying user. End with upgrade prompt to annual plan.

Create a 45-second investor pitch teaser video for a seed-stage startup called Mosaic (AI-powered procurement for SMBs). Audience: early-stage VCs watching cold LinkedIn outreach. Must establish the problem, the market size signal, and the traction in under 45 seconds. No audio dependency — founders are sending this without a call. End with calendar link CTA.

Storyboard a 60-second 'social proof wall' video for Solaris ERP. Format: rapid-fire customer quotes + logos, interspersed with one key stat per quote. Target viewer: CFO or COO at a mid-market manufacturer considering ERP replacement. Platform: website homepage autoplay (muted default). No talking heads — text and logo animations only.

Create a storyboard for a 90-second video email for a product update announcement. Product: Glint (status report automation). Update: new Confluence integration + AI summary templates. Audience: existing paying users. Goal: reduce churn by showing active development. Tone: friendly, founder-led. Shot on a laptop webcam. End with NPS survey CTA.

Storyboard a 30-second TikTok/Reels organic video for a $220 mechanical keyboard brand (enthusiast market). Hook: ASMR typing sounds in first 2 seconds. Show the product from multiple angles, one 'satisfying' feature detail shot, one typing test. End with brand name + website. No voiceover. Text overlays only. Viral format: satisfying product content.
